theorem: and_comm (P Q : Prop) (h : P ∧ Q) : Q ∧ P

steps.label: Destructure the conjunction
steps.explanation: We break h : P ∧ Q into its two parts. h disappears and we get hp : P and hq : Q as separate hypotheses.

steps.label: Build the conjunction in reverse
steps.explanation: We construct Q ∧ P by providing hq (proof of Q) first and hp (proof of P) second. The anonymous constructor ⟨·, ·⟩ builds the pair.
